_comment: Canonical class index -> name mapping for yolo-card-nano.onnx. Indices MUST match the YOLOv8 head's training order, not alphabetical. Re-verified 2026-05-29 against the new 12.3 MB YOLOv8n (opset 12) embedded ONNX metadata_props 'names': {0: 'ehliyet', 1: 'pasaport', 2: 'ogrenci_karti', 3: 'tc_kimlik', 4: 'akademisyen_karti'} — unchanged from the prior model. Do NOT reorder.
